title: Notification No.57/2007-Cus(NT), dated 5.6.2007
text: [TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY, PART II, SECTION 3, SUB-SECTION (ii) ] GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF FINANCE (DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE) New Delhi, the 5th June, 2007. 15 Jyaistha, 1929 Saka. Notification No. 57/2007-Customs (N.T.) S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, (Import), Jawahar Customs House, Nhava Sheva, Maharashtra to act as common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on the Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, NCR Building, Statue Circle, Jaipur, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Rose Zinc Limited, Air Port Road, Post Gudli, District Udaipur and Others issued, vide, F.No. 23/32/2007-DZU/1607 dated the 30th March, 2007 by the Additional Director General, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Delhi Zonal Unit, CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi. [F.NO.437/ 20 /2007-Cus.IV] (Anupam Prakash) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
